title: Lorrd Academy for Aquatic Studies
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Lorrd Academy for Aquatic Studies''' was a branch of the [[Lorrd University]] on [[Lorrd/Legends|Lorrd]]. It contained huge aquariums.

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], [[Movac Arisster]] took a large crowd hostage there in an attempt to go down in history by killing [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]. However, his plan was thwarted, and only [[Serom Haxan]] died.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
